TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ride ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Mansyu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 167 buwan, 420 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 153 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 267 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 35%, Amis 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Ride hya' ga Tjadukudukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ri*e …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu mans~…ēju …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na ri*e ńßja Ē …£a tja*uku*ukuŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Ride ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Mansyu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 167 buwan, 420 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 153 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 267 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 35%, Amis 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Ride hya' ga Tjadukudukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ri*e …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu mans~…ēju …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na ri*e ńßja Ē …£a tja*uku*ukuŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
